name: pi-interactive-subagents
description: Policy-constrained dynamic DAG workflows and detached subagent compatibility adapters for pi
author: HazAT

scripts.test: node --test test/test.ts test/workflow-contracts.test.ts test/workflow-executor.test.ts test/workflow-host.test.ts test/workflow-security-seams.test.ts test/identity-docs.test.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm exec --yes --package=typescript@5.8.3 -- tsc -p tsconfig.workflow-core-typecheck.json && npm exec --yes --package=typescript@5.8.3 -- tsc -p tsconfig.workflow-typecheck.json --noCheck
